ADMTG_PRVDR_SPCLTY_CD 

LABEL: Admitting Provider Specialty Code 

DESCRIPTION: This code describes the area of specialty for the admitting provider. 

SHORT NAME: ADMTG_PRVDR_SPCLTY_CD 

LONG NAME: ADMTG_PRVDR_SPCLTY_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 2 

SOURCE: T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims 

FILE(S): IP header 
LT header 

VALUES: 01 = General Practice 
02 = General Surgery 
03 =
